description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a cartoonish red panda, featuring a predominantly pinkish-red body with purple accents on the ears, around the eyes, and on the tail. The face is round with large, black, shiny eyes set within a purple mask-like marking, and a small, white snout with a black nose. The toy has short, rounded limbs with purple-tipped paws and a white belly patch. Its tail is bushy and ringed with alternating pink and purple stripes. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the overall form is chubby and inviting, designed to be cuddled or displayed. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A plush, cartoon-style red panda stuffed toy with a pinkish-red body, purple accents, and large black eyes. It has a soft, fuzzy surface and a chubby, cuddly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's round face, large black eyes within a purple mask, white snout, and both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the purple-tipped ear, and the bushy, striped tail extending behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and the full length of the striped tail, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the face, ear, and the tail, with one arm and leg more prominent.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round black eyes and a small, closed mouth. The absence of eyebrows or a pronounced mouth gives it a calm, approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms slightly forward and legs bent, the head facing straight ahead and the tail resting behind.
